name: Fruitables Pumpkin SuperBlend Weight Loss Dog & Cat Supplement
description: Help your furry pal lose weight the healthy way with Fruitables Pumpkin SuperBlend Weight Loss Dog & Cat Supplement. Featuring a savory pumpkin and oatmeal blend for a recipe your pet will devour. This weight loss supplement includes inulin to create a hunger-fighting balance of fiber that will keep your pet full for hours. It also combines nutrient-dense fruits and vegetables, such as tomato, spinach and blueberry, plus B vitamins, to provide a healthy boost during weight loss. The delicious SuperBlend is clinically proven to have your pet losing up to 2% of his body weight per week. Plus, it’s vet-developed, so you know your pal will be getting and well-balanced and nutritious meal.
